seoTitle: Darch vs Dardadine — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Darch and Dardadine. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Darch and Dardadine.
heading: Darch vs Dardadine — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Darch, Western Australia and Dardadine, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dardadine has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Darch (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Darch or Dardadine safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Darch has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Dardadine scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Darch scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Dardadine scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Darch or Dardadine?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dardadine has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
